contentEdits.value: A collection of fast-turn edits created in collaboration with This Was Major
Ultimate Race Week at the Wynn
4 daily recaps + aftermovie — shot, edited, and delivered by the end of the F1 Vegas weekend.
A collection of the best moments from the rally.
These were too good not to include.
Work leading up to the big day.
Directed a team of 7 shooters to capture tech-focused content featuring Western travelers at an AI-centered global summit showcasing technological advancements in Saudi Arabia.
Full game recap produced for Quincy University.
Spent one week onsite capturing content for Mastercard.
A collection of rapid-turn overnight edits.
It Ain’t Right Tour — Sebastian Maniscalco
Traveled with Sebastian and the team on the Ain’t Right Tour, creating overnight recaps of select shows.
Promotional piece with Denzel Ward for an upcoming podcast with Sumedh Basani.
Quick turn piece for FYC Fest
BTS cut for ROSÉ music video shoot for the F1 soundtrack.
Promotional piece for Trevor’s first special.
A sound design–driven piece recapping the game
One week in Costa Rica, capturing content for Naia Villas.
Five days in Manhattan on the Ain’t Right Tour, documenting the city between shows.
A cut made from leftover footage from our time on the Modball Rally.
Created two pieces highlighting TAO’s new exclusive menu.

What started as a spec ad inspired by the brilliant work of director Josh Safdie back in January is finally ready for viewing. So grateful to all the people that helped out on this and the countless lessons we learned throughout the process of filming and editing. It’s unlike anything we’ve made in the past and we truly hope this Social Ad/Short film gives at least one person out there the inspiration to go create!
Produced, Directed, Shot & Edited by us.
Creative Direction, Cam Ops, Lead Editor

Provided creative direction and cinematography across a two-day production at Wynn Las Vegas, delivering campaign content promoting the FIFA World Cup experience at Wynn.

newProjects.title: Meta — Spec Ad
newProjects.description: What started as a spec ad inspired by the brilliant work of director Josh Safdie back in January is finally ready for viewing. So grateful to all the people that helped out on this and the countless lessons we learned throughout the process of filming and editing. It’s unlike anything we’ve made in the past and we truly hope this Social Ad/Short film gives at least one person out there the inspiration to go create!
